title: 文明系统层
summary: 市民、社会、经济、治理、冲突与熵增纪元共同构成文明主循环。
summaryEN: Citizens, society, economy, governance, conflict, and entropy loops form the main civilization cycle.

title: 感知与输入层
summary: 视觉、语言、多模态、教程与观察者效应让体验和系统状态实时耦合。
summaryEN: Visuals, language, multimodal input, tutorials, and observer effects bind the experience to live runtime state.

title: 现实同步层
summary: 现实数据、身份确权、链上证据、存储回溯与幽灵时间让文明与现实发生锚定。
summaryEN: Real-world data, identity proofs, chain evidence, persistence, and ghost-time settlement anchor the simulation to reality.

title: 空间连接层
summary: 跨文明网络、设备接力、P2P 联邦与开放生态负责文明之间的扩展与流动。
summaryEN: Cross-civilization networking, device handoff, P2P federation, and the open ecosystem expand the world beyond one browser tab.

title: 渲染与性能层
summary: WebGPU、预热、基准、录制和性能监控决定这套系统能跑到什么上限。
summaryEN: WebGPU, warmup, benchmarking, recording, and runtime telemetry define the system's performance ceiling.
